title: Unconfuse Me with Bill Gates | All episodes available now
text:
Unconfuse Me with Bill Gates | All episodes available now

In his new podcast, Bill explores the topics that fascinate him most—like Alzheimer's disease, artificial intelligence, marijuana, plant-based meat, and more.

Bill Gates, podcast, podcast with Bill Gates, Seth Rogen and Lauren Miller Rogen, Sal Khan, Questlove, John McWhorter, Yejin Choi, Sam Altman, Hannah Ritchie, Rashida Jones, Bill Gates and Rashida Jones, Elizabeth Kolbert, Bono, Kerry Washington, Yuval Noah Harari, AI, artificial intelligence, climate change, misinformation, plant-based meat, education, Alzheimer’s

Podcasts

I’ve had the chance to create two podcast series that let me dive deep into ideas that fascinate me.

Unconfuse Me

On _Unconfuse Me_ , I got to sit down with experts, innovators, and big thinkers to unpack topics like AI and Alzheimer’s disease. The series is all about digging and finding clarity about subjects that keep me curious and excited about the future.

[](https://www.gatesnotes.com/)

[](https://www.gatesnotes.com/) [IN DEPTH Episode 7 Hannah Ritchie When I start to feel overwhelmed by the climate challenges we face, I turn to Hannah Ritchie, a researcher at Our World in Data.](https://www.gatesnotes.com/meet-bill/my-podcasts/reader/unconfuse-me-podcast-with-guest-hannah-ritchie)

Big Questions

Rashida Jones and I tackled some of the biggest issues of our time—from climate change to inequality to pandemic recovery. Rashida brought a fresh perspective and even taught me the ropes of hosting a podcast.
